case_title: YOU LIANG SONG VS. ARTHUR LIU

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (**SEE SIGNATURE** ON GREEN RETURN RECEIPT CARD) SERVED JUL-06-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, ARTHUR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF YOU LIANG SONG IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPERTER AIDONG NI. DEFENDANT ARTHUR LIU IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLANTIFF'S STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS HAS EXPIRED. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY SONG, YOU LIANG AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, ARTHUR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SONG, YOU LIANG AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, ARTHUR

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SONG, YOU LIANG ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SONG, YOU LIANG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIU, ARTHUR CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFF SONG, YOU LIANG
